title: Asset Categories by World Type
description: Comprehensive asset categorization for Polyhaven asset fetching and world generation. Extracted from polyhaven-models.js and world-3d-defaults.ts

usage.description: This file defines asset categories for each world type to be used when fetching assets from Polyhaven or other asset sources.
usage.polyhavenCategories: Use these categories when querying the Polyhaven API (https://api.polyhaven.com/assets?type=models&categories=...)
usage.tags: Use these tags when creating VisualAsset entries in the database
usage.examples: Example search terms or asset names that fit this category
workflow: 2. Look up asset categories for that world type
3. For each category needed, query Polyhaven with polyhavenCategories
4. Download and store assets with appropriate tags
5. Create VisualAsset entries and assign to asset collection
6. Link asset collection to world via selectedAssetCollectionId

extractedFrom.notes: This data was extracted from hardcoded asset paths and tag definitions before removing those files in favor of a collection-based system.
